refnamediv.refpurpose: Add a point to a LineString.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Adds a point to a LineString before the index position (using a 0-based index). If the position parameter is omitted or is -1 the point is appended to the end of the LineString.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Add a point to the end of a 3D line
Guarantee all lines in a table are closed by adding the start point of each line to the end of the line only for those that are not closed.
refsection.programlisting: UPDATE sometable SET geom = ST_AddPoint(geom, ST_StartPoint(geom)) FROM sometable WHERE ST_IsClosed(geom) = false;
